trans-unit.source: Installation failed, please try again. If it doesn't help, restart the machine.
trans-unit.target: 安装失败，请重试，如果仍然无法安装，请重启机器。

trans-unit.source: Uninstallation completed, please restart the machine.
Do you really want to Exit?

trans-unit.target: 未找到 USB 驱动器

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to Power Off?

trans-unit.target: 两次新密码输入不匹配
单次运行时间最长的游戏
总运行时间最长的游戏

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to Logout?
Login request exipred, please try again.
trans-unit.target: 登录请求已过期，请重试

trans-unit.source: Not enough balance, please top up and try again.
trans-unit.target: 您的余额不足，请充值后重试

trans-unit.source: Session rate has already changed, please cancel and try again.
trans-unit.target: 您请求登录期间费率从外部改变，请取消后重试

trans-unit.source: Sorry, there's already a running session in this station.
trans-unit.target: 无法登录，本机站已被占用

trans-unit.source: Sorry, you're in session somewhere else.
trans-unit.target: 无法登录，您已在别处登录

trans-unit.source: Enter Pin to access system management
trans-unit.target: 输入密码登录系统管理
链接服务器失败，请检查网线或路由器配置

trans-unit.source: Sorry, you are not a member yet. Please finish the Registration
trans-unit.target: 抱歉，您还不是会员。请先完成注册。
正在下载最新版本，请稍候...

trans-unit.source: Software is already up to date
New version available, proceed to download?
trans-unit.target: 有新版本可用, 是否下载?

trans-unit.source: Unexpected error occurred, please check the logs.
Checking updates might take a while to complete.
trans-unit.target: 正在检查更新，这可能需要一些时间

trans-unit.source: Updating process did not finish, please try it again.
Updating might take a while to complete.
trans-unit.target: 正在更新，这可能需要一些时间

trans-unit.source: Update complete, please restart the software to apply the new version.

trans-unit.target: 机站长时间未响应，自动登出

trans-unit.source: Auto logout due to user is blocked.
Auto logout due to internet problems.
Software is out of date, please update to the latest version.
trans-unit.target: 软件版本已过期，请先更新软件

trans-unit.source: No license deployed to this station. Run the configuration.
trans-unit.target: 本机站未检测到授权码，请联系技术支持

trans-unit.source: License is not registered in the system.
trans-unit.target: 授权码尚未注册，请与管理员联系

trans-unit.source: License is not yet linked to an Account.
trans-unit.target: 本机站尚未激活，请联系技术支持

trans-unit.source: License has been revoked. Please contact the support
trans-unit.target: 本机站授权码已从远程系统移除，请联系技术支持

trans-unit.source: License is suspended. Please contact the support
trans-unit.target: 本机站授权码已暂停使用，请联系技术支持
本机站已从远程服务器撤销
本机站暂停使用，请与管理员联系
未找到可用的应用程序

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to logout?
Are you sure to reset statistics data?
Are you sure to start a VR application in Screen mode?
trans-unit.target: 当前为大屏模式，确定要启动 VR 应用吗？

trans-unit.source: Are you sure to start a non-VR application in VR mode?
trans-unit.target: 当前为 VR 模式，确定要启动非 VR 应用吗？

trans-unit.source: Scan the QR Code to Start
Open mode is not allowed on this station. Please verify your settings.
trans-unit.target: 本机站不支持开放模式，请联系技术支持

trans-unit.source: Last login intention ended unexpectedly, please wait for the server to handle it.
trans-unit.target: 另一个登录请求正在处理中，请稍后再试

trans-unit.source: There an session already running. Abandoned Sessions will end after a short while.
trans-unit.target: 机站仍处于登录状态，请稍候当前登录退出

trans-unit.source: There is an unknown error, please try again later.
Select an option to start with
Please select your license files to continue.
trans-unit.target: 请选择你的授权码文件

trans-unit.source: Starts the Application automatically when you Login into Windows
trans-unit.target: 开机登陆Windows后自动启动软件

trans-unit.source: Disables the Windows Dialog when an Application Crashes. This Error Dialog can prevent the software from detecting when an Application Ended
trans-unit.target: 当程序异常崩溃时，禁止windows弹出错误对话框。 此对话框将影响软件检测应用的退出状态。
开机自启动设置 完成
游戏存储目录设置 完成
Windows错误报告设置 完成

trans-unit.source: Change of Windows Defender Excluded Folders
trans-unit.target: 更改游戏目录的Windows防护设置

trans-unit.source: Changes the Windows Defender Exclusion Settings for the Storage Folder. This can prevent game corruption in case of false positives from WD, but also expose the System to a higer risk of infections.
trans-unit.target: 关闭游戏目录的Window防护，将防止某些文件被错误清除，而导致的游戏文件损坏，但也同时增加了系统感染的风险。

trans-unit.source: The Language that is selected when the Software starts or it reverts after a Logout.
trans-unit.target: 软件每次启动，或登出后的待登陆界面语言。
添加授权码至你的账号

trans-unit.source: Fill out the Form and Enter your License Key for Activation
trans-unit.target: 填充表格并输入你的授权码以激活

trans-unit.source: Learn more about Content Creation and Business Functions on our Website
trans-unit.target: 通过官网了解更多关于内容包制作以及商业版功能

trans-unit.source: Unknown error, please try again later.
trans-unit.target: 未知的错误，请稍后重试。

trans-unit.source: Are you really sure you want to delete the account?
A display name for one executable instruction that infers what's it about
trans-unit.target: 指定一个名称用以向用户展示该启动项隐含的意思

trans-unit.source: Parameters that will be provided to the main executable when execution of the game is requested.
trans-unit.target: 可执行文件的启动参数,该参数总是应用到指定的可执行文件(游戏本身的可执行文件或启动器),可选

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether this executable is one of the executables taken into consideration to check if the application is running. Normally an application requires at least one main executable. Multiple main executables mean any of them running will the application be considered as running.
trans-unit.target: 指示该进程是否作为衡量应用程序正在运行的主要进程,通常情况下一个应用程序至少有一个主要进程,如果指定了多个主要进程,那么其中任何一个正在运行,系统将视作该应用程序者正在运行

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether this process should be killed when the system detects it is not responding
trans-unit.target: 指示系统是否在应用退出时结束该进程

trans-unit.source: Indicates whether this process should be killed on application exit
trans-unit.target: 指示系统是否在该进程无响应是强制结束该进程

trans-unit.source: The path to the applixcation main executable file. Usually it is the application executable itself, for some applications requiring an external launcher this should be set the path to the launcher executable file.
trans-unit.target: 应用主要进程的可执行程序,通常为应用程序本身.对于需要启动器的应用,则为启动器执行程序

trans-unit.source: Specify the corresponding vr module to match the correct graphic api.
trans-unit.target: 指定与该应用程序相匹配的VR模块

trans-unit.source: Working directory of a specific executable. If not set, working directory will be set to the directory where the executable is
trans-unit.target: 可执行程序所依赖的工作目录.若为空,默认为可执行程序所在的目录
进程无响应时强制结束

trans-unit.source: None of added executables is marked as main executable, are you sure to continue?
trans-unit.target: 没有任何程序为主要进程,你确定继续吗?

trans-unit.source: This file is not a VBox File!
Restart Vr Driver after each App
There were some Problems during execution of the Tasks
trans-unit.target: 任务执行过程中遇到一些问题

trans-unit.source: Your storage directory is not empty and you will need to move all your contents manually to the new destination
trans-unit.target: 你当前的游戏存储目录不为空，你需要手动将当前目录下内容移至新的存储目录

trans-unit.source: Your storage directory is not empty, it's recommended to use a dedicated directory as your game directory
trans-unit.target: 你的游戏存储目录不为空，建议使用空目录作为存储目录

trans-unit.source: Sorry there is no Execution Option availible! Please check if you have any configured and that your system meets the requirements.
trans-unit.target: Sorry there is no Execution Option availible! Please check if you have any configured and that your system meets the requirements.

trans-unit.source: The Username Password combination is invalid
Can not connect to Server. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: 无法连接服务器，请一会重试
